featureName: BUG-017-002: Trace-guard G068 regression on SCN-GA-NWS-002 after framework v3.8.0 upgrade

executionHistory.evidence: Artifact-only fix: inserted 1 scenario-prefix DoD bullet for SCN-GA-NWS-002 into specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/scopes.md Scope 03 between the existing 'Event types classified ...' bullet and the '17 unit tests pass ...' bullet. Bullet contains the literal trace ID 'SCN-GA-NWS-002' (satisfying G068 v3.8.0 trace-ID fast path) and the significant words NWS, severity, event, classification (satisfying the fuzzy fallback). All other Scope 03 bullets preserved byte-identical. No production code changed.

Underlying NWS behavior tests PASS: `go test -count=1 -v -run '^TestMapNWSSeverity$|^TestClassifyNWSEventType$' ./internal/connector/alerts/` exit 0 (all sub-tests PASS for Extreme/Severe/Moderate/Minor/Unknown severity mapping and all 8 event-type categories). Full alerts suite PASS: `go test ./internal/connector/alerts/ -count=1` exit 0 (175 tests, 7.358s). Race-detector subset PASS: `go test -race -count=1 -run 'TestSync_Deduplication|TestSync_ConcurrentWithLiveKnownMapWrites|TestKnownMapEviction|TestConcurrentSyncHealth|TestConcurrentCloseHealth' ./internal/connector/alerts/` exit 0 (1.334s). Output recorded inline in report.md > Test Evidence.

Traceability guard PASS: `bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector` returns `RESULT: PASSED (0 warnings)` with `13 scenarios checked, 13 mapped to DoD, 0 unmapped`. Pre-fix baseline (HEAD 90554aca, pre-edit): `RESULT: FAILED (2 failures, 0 warnings)` with `12/13 mapped` and explicit G068 fidelity gap on SCN-GA-NWS-002. Output recorded inline in report.md > Validation Evidence.

Artifact lint PASS for parent (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector`) and bug folder (`bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/bugs/BUG-017-002-trace-guard-g068-regression`). git diff --name-only confirms boundary: only specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/scopes.md, specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/report.md, specs/017-gov-alerts-connector/state.json, and the new bug folder are touched. Zero changes under internal/, cmd/, ml/, config/, or tests/.
